/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/supervisor_app.dir/src/echo_supervisor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/supervisor_app.dir/src/dashboard.cpp.o -o supervisor_app   -L/opt/homebrew/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib ../Common/libArgusCommon.a -framework OpenGL /opt/homebrew/lib/libglfw.3.4.dylib
